title: spergula vernalis var. granulata
intro: Spergula vernalis var. granulata, also known as sand-spurrey or granulated spurrey, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Spergula vernalis var. granulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical applications and internal remedies for various health conditions.
